title: The Shadow Stalker
description:
Shadow Stalker – Update 6.1.1
Now fully rewritten and retextured! The Shadow Stalker is a small, sculk-infused creature with high jumps and a compact body perfect for hiding. Thanks to TexturePug for the new textures!
body:
# Shadow Stalker

## Update 6.1.1

**A horror mod that truly stalks from a distance.** Something watches you secretly as you sleep.

The Shadow Stalker is a horrifying new creature that is very small, so he can jump high and fit through small spaces. He seems to like sculk. He can:

- Watch you from afar without getting caught
- Call in reinforcements from The Watcher – A creature who invisibly stalks, leaving only a shadow.
- Destroy blocks, come in your house uninvited, and kill animals.
- Swim very quickly, pretend to be friendly, and jump at you.
- Leaves behind a mysterious item, maybe it can be used for something?
If you want to survive him and his friend, you must be prepared right away.
  
- You may want to craft a shield...
- Craft a weapon, encasing the soul of the Shadow Stalker, delivering power.

🔧 Version Support
- Minecraft 1.19.2
- ⚠️ Minecraft 1.20.1 and 1.21.1 support currently under review by the Parallax Studios dev team.
